sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this simulation game

special_mechanics.name: Elevator Simulation
special_mechanics.description: Core mechanic involving elevator scheduling and management. Game emphasizes efficient elevator traffic control to reduce tenant stress. Standard elevators span maximum 30 floors; express elevators span entire building height.

special_mechanics.name: Building Constraints
special_mechanics.description: Tower limited to maximum 100 floors above ground and 9 stories below ground

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data. SimTower is a construction and management simulation, not an action platformer. No character movement physics, gravity, or jump mechanics are relevant to this game. Documentation focuses on building management, elevator systems, and gameplay mechanics rather than physics parameters.
